title: exochaenium alatum
intro: Exochaenium alatum, also known as the winged exochaenium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Exochaenium alatum include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Herbal preparations of Exochaenium alatum typically involve the leaves or roots being steeped in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap the plant's medicinal and health benefits.
